title: Sentinel Shield release-promotion override record
description: A version-controlled, two-person-approved, time-boxed record that authorises promoting a release STAGE despite one or more UNMET readiness gates. Consumed by scripts/check-release-readiness.sh as the ONLY accepted override mechanism at beta/rc/ga (alpha additionally accepts a loudly-reported free-text --override-reason). An override can NEVER waive tracked secrets, malformed evidence (validator exit 2), failed rollback integrity, or destructive path-safety — those fail closed regardless. The record must match the promotion's version AND stage, be unexpired, and be approved by a DIFFERENT person than the requester (self-approval is forbidden).

schema_version.description: Schema version. Only "1" is supported; consumers fail closed on anything else.

version.description: Release version label this override applies to. Must equal the --version being promoted; a mismatch is rejected.

stage.description: Release stage this override authorises. Must equal the --stage being promoted; a mismatch is rejected. rc/ga overrides are exceptional and must be signed off accordingly.

controls.description: Non-empty list of the specific unmet controls/gates this override consciously bypasses. Never includes tracked-secret, malformed-evidence, rollback-integrity, or path-safety failures — those are non-waivable.

reason.description: Documented justification for bypassing the listed controls.

requested_by.description: GitHub login of the person requesting the override.

approved_by.description: GitHub login of the approver. MUST differ from requested_by (self-approval is forbidden); this is enforced by check-release-readiness.sh, not expressible in plain JSON Schema.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ) the record was created.

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ). The override only applies while expires_at is in the future; an expired record is rejected (fail closed).

$comment: Cross-field rules enforced by scripts/check-release-readiness.sh and not expressible in plain JSON Schema: version/stage must equal the promotion target; requested_by != approved_by; expires_at must be in the future.
